mxCell.value:
CARTLIFT AI
End-to-End Machine Learning Pipeline
PHASE 1: DATA SOURCES & RAW DATA
PHASE 2: DATA CLEANING & ENRICHMENT
PHASE 3: SESSION SIMULATION
PHASE 4: GRAPH & EMBEDDINGS
PHASE 5: FEATURE ENGINEERING
PHASE 6: MODEL TRAINING
PHASE 7: INFERENCE & SERVING
PHASE 8: FRONTEND & USER INTERACTION

Zomato Dataset
(Kaggle)
zomato_dataset.csv

• Restaurant Names
• Dining/Delivery Ratings
• Cuisines
• Menu Items
• Prices
• Votes
• Best Seller Flags

Sample Data
Generator
generate_sample_data.py

Creates synthetic
Zomato-like data
for development

Data Cleaning
clean_dataset.py

• Column standardization
• City name normalization
• Price extraction
• Rating cleaning
• Unique ID generation
• Missing value handling

Cleaned Data

restaurants_cleaned.csv
• 890 restaurants
• Unique IDs

menu_items_cleaned.csv
• 70K items
• Normalized prices

Item Categorizer
item_categorizer.py

• Rule-based classification
• Keyword matching
• Categories:
- Main
- Side
- Dessert
- Beverage
• Veg/Non-veg detection

Enriched Items
menu_items_enriched.csv

• item_category
• is_veg
• price_band
• cuisine_group

Session
Preprocessing
session_preprocessing.py

• Filter valid items
• Calculate weights
• Prepare item pools
• Category balancing

Simulation
Menu Items
menu_items_simulation.csv

• Selection weights
• Category pools
• Price ranges

Session Generator
session_generator.py

• 50K-1M orders simulation
• Category transitions
• Time-of-day context
• User type simulation
• Price bracket matching
• Negative sampling (5x)
• Meal type logic

Cart Events
cart_events.csv

• 4.6M+ events
• session_id
• user_id
• restaurant_id
• cart_items
• candidate_item
• label (0/1)
• hour, meal_type

Users Data
users.csv

• 50K users
• user_type
• cuisine prefs
• spending habits

Extract
Sequences
extract_sequences.py

• Filter positives
• Group by session
• Order items
• Create sequences

Cart Sequences
cart_sequences.csv

• Ordered item
sequences
• Pipe-separated
item IDs

Build Co-occurrence
Graph
build_cooccurrence.py

• P(j|i) computation
• Top-K neighbors
• Edge weighting
• Sequential analysis

Co-occurrence
Graph
item_cooccurrence.pkl

• Adjacency list
• Item counts
• Pair counts
• Transition probs

Train Node2Vec
train_node2vec.py

• Random walks
• Walk length: 20
• Context size: 10
• Walks/node: 10
• gensim Word2Vec
• Embedding dim: 64

Item Embeddings
item_embeddings.npy
item_id_mapping.pkl

• 70K × 64 matrix
• L2 normalized
• Similar items →
similar vectors

Feature Builder
feature_builder.py

• Fix zero embeddings
• Category centroid
imputation
• User RFM features
• Restaurant features
• Feature normalization
• Scaler fitting

Fixed Embeddings
item_embeddings_fixed.npy

• Zero imputed
• L2 normalized
• Category centroids

User Features
user_features.parquet

• recency_days
• frequency
• monetary_avg
• cuisine_entropy
• dessert_ratio
• beverage_ratio
• (all normalized)

Restaurant Features
restaurant_features.parquet

• smoothed_rating
• delivery_votes
• avg_item_price
• price_band_index
• menu_size
• (all normalized)

CartDataset
(PyTorch Dataset)

• Load cart events
• Index mapping
• Feature lookup
• On-the-fly features
• Memory efficient

CartAddToCartModel
cart_transformer.py

Architecture:
• Cart Encoder (2L, 4H)
• Positional Encoding
• Mean Pooling

Features (218d):
• Cart embed (64d)
• Candidate embed (64d)
• Interaction (65d)
• User (7d)
• Restaurant (5d)
• Cart dynamic (6d)
• Context (7d)

MLP:
218→256→128→1
(Sigmoid)

Model Training
train_model.py

• BCEWithLogitsLoss
• pos_weight=5.0
• AdamW optimizer
• CosineAnnealing LR
• Time-based split
• AUC, PR-AUC metrics
• Early stopping
• Checkpointing

Model Checkpoints
checkpoints/

• best_model_final.pt
• checkpoint_epoch_*.pt
• final_model.pt

Contains:
• model_state_dict
• optimizer_state
• epoch, metrics
• config

Evaluation
topk_evaluation.py

• Precision@K
• Recall@K
• NDCG@K
• MRR
• Hit Rate@K
• vs Random baseline

InferenceModel
(Wrapper Class)

• Load frozen model
• Load embeddings
• Feature lookups
• Candidate ranking
• Top-K selection
• Score computation

FastAPI Service
inference_service.py

Endpoints:
POST /recommend
GET /health
GET /restaurants
GET /restaurants/{id}/items

Features:
• CORS middleware
• Latency tracking
• Error handling
• uvicorn server

API Request

{
user_id: string,
restaurant_id: string,
cart_item_ids: [],
hour: int,
meal_type: string
}

API Response

{
recommendations: [{
item_id,
item_name,
price,
category,
score
}],
latency_ms: float
}

Performance

• Request parse: 0.1ms
• Feature lookup: 2.0ms
• Embedding lookup: 0.1ms
• Model forward: 0.15ms
• Total: ~32ms

React Frontend
frontend-react/

• TypeScript
• Vite build
• CartContext
• useRecommendations
• Component-based
• Modern UI

USER EXPERIENCE

1. Select restaurant
2. Browse menu items
3. Add items to cart
4. View AI recommendations
5. Add suggested items
6. Complete order

BUSINESS IMPACT

• Attach Rate: 75% → 91%
• Revenue/Session: +19.7%
• Avg Position: 3.1 → 2.3
• Item Discovery: Improved
Data Storage
Processing Step
Output File
ML Component
Model Training
API Service
Graph Structure
Data Flow
API Call
KEY METRICS & DIMENSIONS

Data Scale: 70K items, 890 restaurants, 50K users, 4.6M events
Embedding: 70K × 64 dimensions (Node2Vec)
Model Input: 218 features (cart 64d + candidate 64d + interaction 65d + user 7d + restaurant 5d + cart_dyn 6d + context 7d)
Model Architecture: MLP 218 → 256 → 128 → 1 (ReLU, Dropout 0.1, Sigmoid)
Training: BCEWithLogitsLoss, pos_weight=5, AdamW, CosineAnnealing
Inference: ~32ms latency, Top-8 recommendations
TECHNOLOGY STACK

ML/Data: PyTorch, NumPy, Pandas, gensim
Graph: Node2Vec, Word2Vec (gensim)
API: FastAPI, Uvicorn, Pydantic
Frontend: Streamlit, React, TypeScript, Vite
Storage: Parquet, NumPy (.npy), Pickle
Evaluation: scikit-learn (AUC, PR-AUC)

Feature Scalers
feature_scalers.pkl

• StandardScaler
• Mean/Std stats
